items.question: How long does a project take?
items.answer: From 5 to 60 days depending on type and scope. A landing page or Telegram bot takes 5–10 days, a corporate website 10–20 days, a CRM system 30–45 days, and a mobile app 30–60 days.

items.question: How much does a website cost?
items.answer: Landing pages start at $175, corporate websites at $300, online stores at $500. The exact price depends on features, design complexity, and number of pages. We provide a concrete quote during a free consultation.

items.question: How much does a Telegram bot cost?
items.answer: A simple order-taking bot starts at $100. A bot with payment integration and admin panel runs $200–$400. CRM or third-party integrations are quoted individually.

items.question: Which platforms do you build mobile apps for?
items.answer: Cross-platform apps for Android and iOS from a single codebase (React Native / Flutter). This saves time and money while preserving native speed and capabilities.

items.question: What services do you offer?
items.answer: Websites (landing, corporate, e-commerce), mobile apps (Android and iOS), Telegram bots, CRM systems, technical support, and custom development. We also redesign existing sites.

items.question: Do I need to buy the domain and hosting myself?
items.answer: No. We provide 1 year of domain and 1 month of hosting. Afterwards, you can extend hosting with us or move to your own provider.

items.question: What is the process after ordering?
items.answer: 1) Free consultation and requirements gathering; 2) Project structure and design prototype; 3) After your approval, development begins; 4) Testing and launch; 5) Free technical support period.

items.question: Is there technical support after delivery?
items.answer: Yes. All projects include 1 to 3 months of free technical support: bug fixes, small edits, and consultations. After that you can continue on a monthly plan (from $50/mo).

items.question: How does payment work?
items.answer: 50% upfront when work begins, the remaining 50% after delivery. We accept Click, Payme, cash or bank transfer. International clients can pay in USD.

items.question: Are your websites SEO-optimized?
items.answer: Yes. Every site is built with SEO in mind: speed (Core Web Vitals), proper meta tags, sitemap, robots.txt, structured data (schema.org), mobile-friendly design, and Google Search Console setup. We also optimize for AI search engines (AEO).

items.question: Will I be able to edit the website myself?
items.answer: Yes. Corporate sites and stores include a simple admin panel — you can edit text, images, products and prices without a developer. We use Strapi, Sanity, or a custom solution.

items.question: Can you update or speed up my existing website?
items.answer: Yes. We audit: SEO, speed, design, security. Then we recommend optimization, redesign, or a complete rebuild — whichever is faster and cheaper.

items.question: Do you work with clients outside Tashkent?
items.answer: Yes. We work remotely with clients across Uzbekistan and internationally. Communication via Telegram, Zoom, phone, and email. Contracts are signed electronically.

items.question: What technologies do you work with?
items.answer: Frontend: React, Next.js, Astro, Vue. Backend: Node.js, Python (Django/FastAPI), PHP (Laravel). Mobile: React Native, Flutter. Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL. Cloud: Vercel, Railway, AWS, DigitalOcean.
